## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content creation progress and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [3 calibration articles completed (clear liners, cost, rotate tires) ready for Sunbit's review](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Aim to publish first articles next week, pending legal/banking review](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Plan to ramp up content production based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Exploring automation options for content workflow (Trey.ai, Monday.com integration)](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Progress

  - [3 calibration articles completed:](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [Clear liners (comprehensive 1-on-1 guide)](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [Cost analysis (extensive coverage)](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - ["Rotate your tires" (comparison piece with Sunbit's attempt)](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Articles are lengthy to rank for high-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Avoided financing topics, included disclaimers and registered symbols](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Stored in shared folder for easy access](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)

### Review Process and Feedback

  - [Jason to review articles for tone, style, and content](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Legal and banking teams to provide thorough feedback](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [GrowthX to use feedback for training models and human writers](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Aim for simplified, streamlined review process long-term](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

### Content Scaling and Potential

  - [Sunbit's website traffic: 800,000 unique visitors last year (90% branded)](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Significant opportunity for non-branded traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Plan to increase article production pending initial feedback](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Potential for 3+ new articles next week, ramping up based on calibration results](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Image Sourcing

  - [Stock images acceptable (Pexels, Adobe Stock, Envato)](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Sunbit may provide direct access to stock image accounts](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [AI-generated images allowed (ensuring realistic depictions)](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Long-term goal: incorporate more action shots and original imagery](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### Content Publishing Workflow

  - [Jason to review articles and send to legal simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [GrowthX can publish directly with CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Exploring VPN setup (Cloudflare Warp) for GrowthX team access](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Potential automation using Trey.ai and Monday.com:](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [Article creation in Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [Import to Monday.com](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [Trigger legal review](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [Automate publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/sH9HyeWrt6TeLee9SySH-6bYeAYkYTVe?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
